panels.description: Displays the count of open incidents.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM 
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')

panels.title: Open Incidents

panels.description: Displays the count of open incidents that have problems associated with them.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS Count
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
INNER JOIN
`INT:HPDPBM:PBI:SV_IncidentProblemInvestigationAssociation`
ON (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `INT:HPDPBM:PBI:SV_IncidentProblemInvestigationAssociation`.`Request ID02` AND `INT:HPDPBM:PBI:SV_IncidentProblemInvestigationAssociation`.`Form Name01`= 'PBM:Problem Investigation')
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'

panels.title: Open Incidents related to Problems

panels.description: Displays the count of open incidents where the incidents are tagged to service Cis and the underlying service Cis have been marked as critical/important.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1
FROM 
`HPD:Help Desk`
INNER JOIN `AST:BaseElement`
ON `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` is not null and `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI`= `AST:BaseElement`.`Name`and `AST:BaseElement`.`Urgency`=1000
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')

panels.title: Open Incidents related to Critical Services

panels.description: Displays the count of the open major incidents where the MI flag is set to ‘Yes’

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS Count
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes'
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'

panels.title: Open Major Incidents

panels.description: Displays the count of the open incidents that are linked to a Service CI

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02`) AS Count
FROM
`HPD:Associations`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `HPD:Help Desk`
ON `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` and `HPD:Associations`.`Request Type01`= 'Configuration Item'
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'

panels.title: Open Incidents related to Service CIs

renameByName.Count: Open Incidents Linked to a Service CI

panels.description: Displays count of open incidents by their Operational Categorization.

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 1` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 2` AS C3,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 3` AS C4
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
select t1.Tiers ,t1.C1, t1.Category from 
(SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 1` is not null then 'Category Tier 1' END)  AS Tiers,
'Category Tier 1' AS Category
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
where
 `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)
group by Tiers
union
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 1` is not null and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 2` is not null) then 'Category Tier 2' END)  AS Tiers,
'Category Tier 2' AS Category
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
where
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)
group by Tiers
union
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 1` is not null and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 2` is not null and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 3` is not null) then 'Category Tier 3' END)  AS Tiers,
'Category Tier 3' AS Category
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
where
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)
group by Tiers
union
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
(CASE WHEN (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 1` is null) then 'No Category' END)  AS Tiers,
'No Category' AS Category
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
where
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)
group by Tiers)
AS t1
group by t1.Category, t1.Tiers, t1.C1
having Tiers is not null

panels.title: Open Incidents by Operational Categorization

panels.description: Displays the count of the open Major incidents by service.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS Count,
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` is not null then `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` else 'Unknown' END) as serviceCIname
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes'
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
group by serviceCIname
order by Count desc
LIMIT 5

panels.title: Top 5 Services with Most Open Major Incidents

panels.description: Displays the count of the open incidents by Top 5 support groups

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
 (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company))
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY numberofinc DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Support Groups with Most Open Incidents

panels.description: Lists the Top 5 CIs with highest count of incidents associated with them.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02`) AS Count,
`HPD:Associations`.`Request Description01` AS CIName
FROM
`HPD:Associations`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `HPD:Help Desk`
ON `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` and `HPD:Associations`.`Request Type01`= 'Configuration Item'
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'
group by CIName 
order by Count DESC
limit 5

panels.title: Top 5 CIs with Most Open Incidents

panels.description: Volume of incidents (Open) classified by Service.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` is not null then `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` else 'Unknown' END) as serviceCIname
FROM 
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved') and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company))
group by serviceCIname
order by C1 desc
LIMIT 5

panels.title: Top 5 Services with Most Open Incidents

panels.description: Problem Investigations created for open incidents that are in various stages (draft, in-progress, investigation completed, change request created or know error created)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
 COUNT(`HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02`) AS inccount,
`PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` AS PBIStatus
FROM
`HPD:Associations`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `HPD:Help Desk`
ON `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` and `HPD:Associations`.`Request Type01`= 'Problem Investigation' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN `PBM:Problem Investigation`
ON `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID01` = `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Problem Investigation ID`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
group by
PBIStatus
having `PBM:Problem Investigation`.`Investigation Status` is not null

panels.title: Open Incidents by Problem Status

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT (CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` IS NOT NULL THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` ELSE 'Unknown' END) Company FROM `HPD:Help Desk` WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` NOT In ('Resolved','Closed','Cancelled') LIMIT 1000"}
